name: rust-bug-fix
description: Realistic short session: user fixes a Rust async bug, decides on a pattern, hits one gotcha. Tests whether the model extracts both the decision and the gotcha as separate pages, not just a session log.

observations.title: user prompt
observations.body: the writer actor is panicking when the bounded mpsc channel fills up — fix it without unbounding the channel

observations.title: Read result
observations.body: found send() being called from an async context — current code uses try_send and unwraps the Err on full

observations.title: user prompt
observations.body: yes, replace the try_send unwrap with awaiting send and let backpressure propagate; do not silently drop writes

observations.title: cargo test
observations.body: 1 test failed: writer_panics_on_full — needs updating since panic behavior changed; replaced with assertion on backpressure delay

observations.title: Edit
observations.body: writer.rs tests: replaced the panic-expectation test with a timing-based backpressure test

observations.title: user prompt
observations.body: also note that I want fire-and-forget hook ingress to remain bounded; never block the HTTP handler on the writer
